Herbalist-formulated flavor

Bold carryout that moves fast, eats clean, and keeps Hannibal craving smart.

Flux & Crave brings whole chicken wings, wraps, salads, bowls, and wellness-forward boosters together in one carryout-ready concept built for pickup, delivery, and repeat orders.

Order Here See the menu
  • Fried in coconut oil
  • No cow products
  • Chicken, turkey, and tofu options
  • Pickup and local delivery
Flavor in Motion
Clean ingredients. Stronger crave.

Fast carryout with a sharper food story

Built for speed, reliability, and hot packaging without dropping the quality cues people remember.

Wellness-forward without losing the bite

Cleaner ingredient decisions, bright sauces, and a founder-formulated edge give the menu a lane of its own.

Tri-state appeal from Hannibal outward

Positioned for Hannibal, Quincy, and the surrounding towns with a catchy identity people can repeat and recommend.

Why it hits different

Flavor that lands hard, ingredients that feel intentional.

Flux & Crave is built around the kind of fast food customers talk about after the meal: crispy texture, bright finishes, memorable names, and a menu that feels smarter than the average carryout spot.

Faster than typical carryout
Cleaner ingredients
Stronger flavor payoff
Wellness-informed menu mix
Catchy enough to stop the scroll. Clean enough to support the brand promise.
Featured menu

Signature plates, wraps, bowls, and boosters.

Lead with the items that give Flux & Crave its own voice and keep the broader menu one tap away.

Sandwiches & Wraps

The Flux Capacitor

Crispy chicken breast fried in coconut oil with Flux Ex sauce and pickles on toasted brioche.

Sandwiches & Wraps

The Velocity Sub

Roasted chicken or smoked turkey breast with bean sprouts, pickled onions, and Flux Fire dusting on a toasted hoagie.

Boxes & Combos

The Heavyweight Flux Box

Choose fried chicken, smoked turkey, or crispy tofu over a bed of fresh-cut Tornado Fries with Flux Ex and Citrus Spark.

Salads & Bowls

The Alkaline Flux Bowl

Quinoa, baby spinach, cherry tomatoes, and cucumber ribbons with Citrus Spark vinaigrette.

Boxes & Combos

Crave Combo

Choose tenders or whole chicken wings with signature slaw and a Lemon Shaker.

Apothecary Boosters

Flux Sea Moss Gel

Wild-crafted, multi-mineral sea moss gel in Gold or Purple.

Chicken lane

Whole chicken wings, combo boxes, and sandwich builds that move fast and photograph well.

Fresh lane

Bowls, wraps, salads, tofu options, and bright herbal finishes that keep the menu from feeling ordinary.

Boost lane

Sea moss, tinctures, and functional add-ons that give the business a memorable differentiator in the region.

The concept

Eat different. Crave smart.

Flux means movement, and the brand leans into that energy. This is a carryout-and-delivery concept designed to feel bold, modern, and memorable while still communicating cleaner ingredients and an herbalist-informed perspective.

The result is a menu built to sell in multiple lanes: craveable comfort food, fast lunch, salad-first orders, and wellness-oriented add-ons that help the brand stand apart in the tri-state market.

3827 Highway MM, Hannibal, Missouri

Built for local pickup, fast handoff, and a delivery footprint around the store. Use the QR, call direct, or jump straight into ordering.
